subject: Application — Senior Mechanical Engineer / Product Developer
paragraphs: I am writing to express my interest in contributing my MedTech product development experience to your team. With more than eight years across biomedical R&D, mechanical design, and cross-functional delivery, I bring a strong track record of taking devices from concept through regulatory readiness.

My experience spans implant systems, surgical instrumentation, electro-mechanical platforms, and software-enabled medical products. I am comfortable leading technical work, collaborating with quality and regulatory stakeholders, and communicating progress clearly to clients and internal teams.
I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my background in design, verification, and product delivery could support your organisation's goals.
